```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Nearly 6,500 people experiencing homelessness in the City of Los Angeles are living in about 4,000 RVs.",
    "The number of people experiencing homelessness living in RVs has grown by 40% since 2018.",
    "22% of the City's total unsheltered homeless population is represented by those living in RVs.",
    "The City's RV storage lots are 95% full.",
    "The City of Los Angeles needs additional locations to store RVs taken off the streets.",
    "Caltrans can lease property to the City for emergency shelter or feeding services at a rate of $1 per month.",
    "AB 2525 allows Caltrans to include the storage of recreational vehicles as a third option for leasing property at the same low rate."
  ]
}
```
